data.title: Salt Imports Corp. plans significant expansion in 2026 to meet growing U.S. sea salt demand due to supply constraints.
data.description: Salt Imports Corp., a top distributor of food-grade sea salt, revealed plans for significant expansion on March 4, 2026, to cope with high demand in the U.S. Their growth strategy is in response to supply shortages in the market. This initiative comes as a response to the increasing need for their products, with the company's actions focusing on adjusting to unprecedented demand.

data.title: Six startups received non-dilutive grants of $20,000 each in LaunchLNK 2026 program by LPED in Lincoln, Nebraska.
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska, as of March 4, 2026, the Lincoln Partnership for Economic Development (LPED) has revealed the winners of the latest LaunchLNK Grant Program. The program has granted $20,000 each to six emerging startups aiming for high growth, either to establish their presence or to expand their current operations in the area.

data.title: Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) declares $0.40 quarterly dividend; global tech leader in energy efficiency.
data.description: In Cork, Ireland on March 4, 2026, Johnson Controls International plc, a prominent technology company focused on energy efficiency, decarbonization, thermal management, and mission-critical performance, announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share for its shareholders. The dividend was approved by the company's board of directors and showcases the commitment to rewarding its investors. Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI) is recognized as a leader in the global market for its innovative solutions and sustainable practices.

data.title: Business Jet adds over 70,000 sq ft fully leased hangar/office space at Dallas Love Field, totaling 475,000 sq ft.
data.description: Business Jet has recently expanded its Dallas Love Field campus, increasing its total space to over 475,000 square feet spread across 19 hangars, all aimed at facilitating aircraft operations. This expansion project was finalized in March 2026 and follows the initial announcement made in August 2025.

data.title: Libellula Health launches Weight Management Complete concierge program in Tucson amid growing interest in GLP-1 medications.
data.description: In Tucson, Arizona on March 4, 2026, Libellula Health has announced the launch of Weight Management Complete amidst increasing discussions about GLP-1 medications nationwide. This new program, guided by physicians in a concierge-style approach, aims to address weight management challenges. The initiative is set to provide a comprehensive solution and is introduced as a response to the current trend.

data.title: NIL Club reaches 20,000+ groups, 2,000+ schools, 650,000+ student-athletes in revenue-sharing program.
data.description: As of March 4, 2026, NIL Club has exceeded 20,000 active groups and teams in over 2,000 schools, involving approximately 650,000 student-athletes. This development comes at a pivotal time in college sports, coinciding with schools initiating direct revenue-sharing payments.

data.title: Seth Ray purchases Ray & Son Heating & Air Conditioning in Valdosta, GA, continuing family legacy.
data.description: In Valdosta, Georgia on March 4, 2026, Ray & Son Heating & Air Conditioning disclosed that Seth Ray has acquired the company from his parents, marking a significant milestone in their history of providing services to homeowners in South Georgia. This transition signifies the continuation of the family's legacy in the business.

data.title: nugs partners with Roon to offer live music fans better browsing, studio-quality audio, and 60-day free trials.
data.description: In San Francisco on March 4, 2026, nugs, a prominent live music streaming platform, revealed a groundbreaking integration that offers seamless browsing, superior studio-quality hi-res audio, and special 60-day free trial promotions to dedicated live music enthusiasts. This collaboration aims to enhance the overall experience for users and bring unparalleled benefits to the growing community of music lovers.

data.title: Ray Dalio prefers gold over Bitcoin, citing its value increase to $5,200/ounce (80%) compared to Bitcoin falling by 25%. Central banks favor gold for its stability and transferability, making it a reliable reserve asset.
data.description: Ray Dalio, founder of Bridgewater Associates, highlighted the reasons behind gold's 80% surge to $5,200 per ounce and Bitcoin's 25% decline. He argued that central banks are unlikely to invest in Bitcoin due to concerns regarding privacy and control. Gold is the second-largest reserve currency held by central banks, valued for its stability and utility beyond mere speculation. Central banks accumulate gold to bolster their reserves for various economic, political, and geopolitical purposes. Dalio emphasized the unique qualities of gold, including its portability, limited supply, and independence from relying on promises. Unlike most currencies reliant on trust in a promise for value, gold stands out for its intrinsic value. The surge in gold prices signifies a shift from minimal allocation to a more significant position in central bank reserves.

data.title: Unite.ai's TruthScan named "Most accurate AI image detector" by reviewer, Janine Heinrichs, on Feb 26, 2026.
data.description: In Sheridan, Wyoming on March 4, 2026, Unite.ai, a media outlet focused on artificial intelligence, released a detailed assessment of TruthScan on February 26, 2026. According to reviewer Janine Heinrichs, TruthScan emerged as the most precise deepfake identification tool she had tested. The review highlighted numerous instances demonstrating the efficacy of the technology.

data.title: Dr. Bill Winston to host "The Blessing: Anointed for Business" conference on March 20-21 in Forest Park, Illinois.
data.description: Entrepreneurs, CEOs, investors, and faith-driven leaders are set to convene in Forest Park, Illinois on March 20-21 for "The Blessing: Anointed for Business" event. The gathering is organized by Dr. Bill Winston, a renowned global faith leader, entrepreneur, and the founder of Joseph Business School. This event is anticipated to attract a significant number of participants from around the world eager to explore the intersection of faith and business.

data.title: CPOs lead procurement transformation with focus on AI, talent, and risk. Research by ProcureCon Insights shows strategic growth.
data.description: According to a recent study by ProcureCon Insights, procurement executives are increasingly focusing on enhancing their strategic influence and are placing emphasis on automation, collaboration with suppliers, and acquiring digital talent. The research, conducted by a 365-demand generation partner, revealed that in 2026, these leaders are prioritizing these areas to drive business growth. This information was announced today in New York on March 4.

data.title: BMNT and OpenTeams partner to expedite AI adoption in government, offering AI solutions within days.
data.description: A recent collaboration between BMNT, a government innovation company, and OpenTeams, the engineering force behind widely used AI and data technologies, has resulted in the rapid development of functional AI solutions to address validated government requirements. This partnership, announced on March 4, 2026, has significantly decreased the timeframe for delivering AI capabilities from months to just a few days. The success of this initiative highlights the efficiency and effectiveness of combining expertise from different sectors to meet pressing government needs.

data.title: HSL LABS forms panel of top plastic surgeons to improve post-surgical recovery. New initiative to boost standards.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, HSL LABS made a significant announcement regarding the establishment of a Professional Advisory Board comprised of leading plastic and reconstructive surgeons. This initiative aims to enhance post-operative healing support standards. The distinguished cohort of surgeons will provide expertise and guidance in this critical area. This notable development reinforces HSL LABS' commitment to ensuring excellence in patient care.

data.title: LPA sets reporting dates for Full-Year 2025 financial results: Earnings Release - March 18, 2026; Conference Call - March 19, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. ET | 8:00 a.m. CT.
data.description: Logistic Properties of the Americas (LPA), a top developer, owner, and manager of high-quality industrial real estate in Central and South America listed on NYSE American with the ticker symbol LPA, shared its schedule for reporting Full-Year 2025 financial results. The Earnings Release is set for Wednesday, March 18, 2026, after the market closes. Following this, there will be a Conference Call on Thursday, March 19, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET or 8:00 a.m. CT for interested parties to join.

data.title: Olenox Industries reports positive field data in Wichita County, Texas with production expected to meet or surpass BOE/day target.
data.description: A field in Wichita County, Texas is projected to rapidly achieve or surpass its target of producing barrels of oil equivalent per day.
